subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O God, O Thou by Whose Name the doors have been opened wide in the kingdom of creation and the ocean of reunion hath surged
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک فتحت الابواب فی ملکوت الانشاء و ماج بحر الوصال لمن اقبل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
